summary: Pipeline Hero Card UX Refinements - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend (15/15 tests) verified top-actions API returns directive labels ('Reply to Coach Now', 'Send Your Intro Email'), owner/category fields, and priority ordering. Frontend UI tests confirmed action-first layout: CTA label as headline, school name as context, dual CTAs (primary + View School), filter pills working with counts, carousel navigation, and kanban cards with top actions.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Action labels use directive language: 'Reply to Coach Now', 'Send Your Intro Email', 'On Track'
VERIFIED: CTA labels are specific: 'Reply Now', 'Start Outreach', 'View School'
VERIFIED: Owner field values: 'athlete' present for all current actions
VERIFIED: Explanation text is user-friendly, no technical terms
VERIFIED: Frontend hero card shows CTA label as headline ('Reply Now' for coach_flag, 'Start Outreach' for first_outreach)
VERIFIED: School name shown as secondary context below headline (e.g., 'University of Florida D1 76%')
VERIFIED: Dual CTAs present: primary action button + 'View School >' secondary button
VERIFIED: Filter pills show counts and filter correctly (All:9, Coach Flags:1, First Outreach:8)
VERIFIED: Carousel navigation works - counter updates correctly (1/9 -> 2/9 etc)
VERIFIED: Category label ('COACH FLAG') and owner badge ('ATHLETE') displayed in hero
VERIFIED: Explanation text inline (not in card/box) - clean layout
VERIFIED: Progress rail compact inline on desktop (dots with connecting lines)
VERIFIED: Kanban board has 12 cards, 9 display top actions with owner badges
VERIFIED: Kanban cards show directive labels: 'Send Your Intro Email', 'Reply to Coach Now'
VERIFIED: CTA button navigates to school detail page (/pipeline/{program_id})
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data with coach flags on University of Florida and multiple uncontacted schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Hero Card UX Refinements fully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) Action-first layout with CTA label as headline (e.g., 'Reply Now' not school name), 2) School name as context below headline, 3) Dual CTAs: primary action button + 'View School >' link, 4) Filter pills with counts: All, Coach Flags, First Outreach, 5) Carousel navigation with dot indicators, 6) Category label (e.g., 'COACH FLAG') and owner badge (e.g., 'ATHLETE'), 7) Inline explanation text (no box), 8) Compact progress rail (dots + lines), 9) Kanban cards showing directive labels from Top Action Engine. Backend top_action_engine.py ACTION_MAP returns directive labels like 'Reply to Coach Now', 'Send Your Intro Email'. Frontend PipelinePage.js HeroActionsCarousel uses action.cta.label for headline.
